title: thymus hyssopus
intro: Thymus hyssopus, also known as Hyssop, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Hyssop include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, soothing digestive problems, and supporting immune function. Hyssop can be consumed as a tea, added to soups or salads, or used in herbal preparations like tinctures and essential oils.
